clause_text_summary: Auto-renewal for 5-year terms prohibited per AC-PROC-POL S4 and requires EVP/CFO approval
recommendation: Replace with 1-year auto-renewal capped at 3 years

clause_text_summary: Liability capped at 3 months fees (300K) which is only 0.25x annual value vs policy minimum 2x (2.4M)
recommendation: Increase to greater of 2x annual value or 1M per AC-PROC-POL S3.2

clause_text_summary: No insurance requirements specified in contract
recommendation: Add CGL 5M/10M per AC-PROC-POL S6.1 for contracts over 1M

clause_text_summary: No cybersecurity requirements specified including no SOC 2 or ISO 27001 or encryption standards
recommendation: Add SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 and encryption and pen testing requirements

clause_text_summary: Basic confidentiality with 2-year survival below 5-year policy standard
recommendation: Extend survival to 5 years per AC-PROC-POL S3.4

clause_text_summary: No termination for convenience and only termination for cause with 60-day cure
recommendation: Add termination for convenience with 90-day notice

clause_text_summary: Vendor retains ownership of all deliverables including custom work and Contoso gets limited license only
recommendation: Contoso must own custom deliverables as work made for hire

clause_text_summary: Delaware law which is a foreign jurisdiction requiring General Counsel approval per AC-PROC-POL S3.8
recommendation: Change to New York State law

clause_text_summary: Unrestricted subcontracting without Contoso approval
recommendation: Require prior written consent for subcontractors

clause_text_summary: Vendor may increase fees unilaterally with 30-day notice with no cap or justification required
recommendation: Add CPI-based cap and mutual agreement requirement

clause_text_summary: No force majeure clause present
recommendation: Add comprehensive force majeure per AC-PROC-POL S3.6

clause_text_summary: Data may be stored or processed outside domestic jurisdiction without restriction
recommendation: Require data residency in approved jurisdictions

clause_text_summary: Vendor indemnification limited to gross negligence only with no coverage for IP or data breach
recommendation: Add IP infringement and data breach indemnification carve-outs

clause_text_summary: Vendor may amend terms unilaterally with 30-day notice
recommendation: Require mutual written agreement for any amendments

clause_text_summary: Net 45 payment terms compliant with policy
Liability capped at greater of 2x annual fees or 1M USD compliant
No auto-renewal and mutual written agreement for 1-year extensions
CGL 2M/5M meets requirement
E&O 5M/10M meets requirement
SOC 2 Type II certified but missing ISO 27001 which is partial compliance
recommendation: Require ISO 27001 certification in addition to SOC 2

clause_text_summary: No confidentiality clause present which is critical omission given access to sensitive data
recommendation: Add comprehensive confidentiality clause with 5-year survival per AC-PROC-POL S3.4

clause_text_summary: No termination for convenience and only termination for cause creates operational lock-in
recommendation: Add termination for convenience with 90-day notice

clause_text_summary: 24-month warranty meets policy standard
IP ownership determined on case-by-case basis which is vague and non-compliant
recommendation: Specify Contoso ownership of custom models and algorithms as work made for hire

clause_text_summary: New York State law compliant
AAA arbitration compliant
24-hour notification meets AC-PROC-POL S3.7 requirement
License to pre-existing IP limited to agreement term only but should be perpetual
recommendation: Negotiate perpetual irrevocable royalty-free license per policy

clause_text_summary: Contract expired June 30 2023 with no renewal executed and operating without valid agreement
recommendation: Execute new agreement immediately under current policy standards

clause_text_summary: Net 30 days but current policy requires Net 45 for contracts valued 50K-499K
recommendation: Update to Net 45 upon renewal per AC-PROC-POL S5.1

clause_text_summary: Liability capped at 1x annual value (95K) but policy requires greater of 2x (190K) or 1M
recommendation: Increase to 1M minimum per AC-PROC-POL S3.2

clause_text_summary: CGL 1M/2M below current minimum of 2M/5M for general services and may need 10M/25M for on-site enterprise
recommendation: Update to 2M/5M minimum or 10M/25M for enterprise on-site per AC-PROC-POL S6.1

clause_text_summary: Auto liability 1M below current 2M minimum for general services
Contoso not named as additional insured on CGL policies
recommendation: Require Contoso as additional insured per AC-PROC-POL S6.2

clause_text_summary: No professional liability coverage required but should be included for regulatory compliance support
Maintenance org certificate MO-2019-4567 may be expired and industry safety certification from 2020 likely expired
recommendation: Verify all certifications are current before renewal

clause_text_summary: 3-year survival period below 5-year policy standard
recommendation: Extend to 5-year survival per AC-PROC-POL S3.4

clause_text_summary: 60-day return/destruction period but policy requires 30 days
recommendation: Shorten to 30 days per AC-PROC-POL S3.4

clause_text_summary: 12-month warranty below 24-month policy standard
recommendation: Extend to 24 months per AC-PROC-POL S5

clause_text_summary: Different state law rather than New York State per policy
recommendation: Update to New York State law per AC-PROC-POL S3.8

clause_text_summary: State courts rather than AAA arbitration per policy
recommendation: Update to AAA arbitration per AC-PROC-POL S3.8

clause_text_summary: No specific breach notification timeline but policy requires 24 hours
recommendation: Add 24-hour notification requirement per AC-PROC-POL S3.7

clause_text_summary: Basic clause missing enterprise-specific events and 90-day termination right
recommendation: Update to include regulatory directives and termination right per AC-PROC-POL S3.6

clause_text_summary: Basic negligence-only indemnification missing IP and data breach and regulatory carve-outs
recommendation: Strengthen with standard carve-outs per AC-PROC-POL S3.1

clause_text_summary: Hazardous materials reference outdated and should reference current HPR/GHS standards
recommendation: Update regulatory references to current standards
